facebook.content:
You were created for dominion, not obligation. 

Marriage is not just a commitment, but a declaration of God's Kingdom on earth. It's a partnership of equals, co-laboring with God to bring light to the darkness. When you recognize your spouse as a fellow ruler, not a subordinate, you unlock a deeper level of intimacy and authority in your relationship.

As the Bible says, "Submit to one another out of reverence for Christ." - Ephesians 5:21
facebook.fullPost:

As the Bible says, "Submit to one another out of reverence for Christ." - Ephesians 5:21

instagram.content:
Your identity is not defined by your circumstances, but by your covenant with God.

When Adam failed to fulfill his covenant, his identity was not changed – God's identity as his Father remained unchanged. 

"You are my son, my beloved son; I take pleasure in you." (Psalm 2:7) 

Know who you are in Christ, and your circumstances will not dictate your identity.
